case_title: ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC VS. ZOILA GONZALEZ

docket_entries.description: MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON APR-27-2011 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ZOILA GONZALEZ' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. ANGELA, DAUGHTER, APPEARING AS SPANISH INTERPRETER FOR MOTHER, ZOILA GONZALEZ. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE WITH AN ALTERNATE INSTALLMENT PLAN.
